build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(80, 120, 6)

STEP 2: Cut center bore for kingpin pocket — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(13).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature for mounting holes — .workplane(offset=6).rect(40, 80).extrude(2)

STEP 4: Create mounting holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-15, -15).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 5: Repeat step 4 for each of the remaining three mounting holes at positions (15, -15), (-15, 15), and (15, 15)
